title: I have a new go-to browser
summary: The Verge's weekly Installer column features the author's new favorite browser choice. The article is part of a regular roundup of personal tech product recommendations and reviews. Browser selection remains an important aspect of personal computing setup.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 129, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, come on you Gunners, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've mostly been sick, which has meant nearly a full rewatch of Parks and Recreation while alternately napping and feeling bad for myself. But I've also been reading about Nick Fuentes and clowns, listening to old episodes of Short History Of, testing the NextSense Smartbuds while I sleep, writing in the Outerline Markdown app beta, and eagerly looking for things to do with the upcoming Flipper One.   
Today' …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我找到了新的常用浏览器
zh.summary: The Verge的每周Installer专栏介绍了作者新选择的最喜爱的浏览器。这篇文章是定期个人科技产品推荐和评测的一部分。浏览器选择仍然是个人计算设置中的重要方面。

title: China’s shark finning could lead to US seafood sanctions
summary: A formal petition to the US government seeks sanctions on Chinese seafood imports over shark finning practices. The effort connects environmental and animal welfare concerns to international trade policy. This reflects growing pressure on nations to enforce sustainable and ethical fishing standards.
content: A formal petition to the US government calls for sanctions on Chinese seafood imports.

zh.title: 中国的鱼翅贸易可能导致美国对海产品制裁
zh.summary: 一份提交给美国政府的正式请愿书要求对中国海产品进口实施制裁，以应对鱼翅贸易行为。这一举措将环保和动物福利问题与国际贸易政策联系在一起。这反映了国际社会对各国实施可持续和伦理捕鱼标准的压力日益增加。

title: Google’s new anything-to-anything AI model is wild
summary: Google's Gemini AI model can generate realistic videos from diverse inputs with minimal effort, highlighting the increasing accessibility of deepfake technology. The tool demonstrates how convincing generative AI content has become, requiring surprisingly little skill to create. This trend raises critical questions about distinguishing between harmless AI creativity and problematic content.
content:
Just a stuffed deer having the time of his life. | Image: Gemini / The Verge	

Last year I deepfaked my kid's stuffed animal to make it look like his plush deer was on vacation.
It was an experiment to see if I could re-create the events depicted in a Gemini ad Google was running, and I never showed the videos of Buddy the deer on his adventures to my four-year-old. But it was a revealing exercise that made me think a lot about the difference between some harmless fun with generative AI and full-on slop. Maybe that Venn diagram is a perfect circle! Maybe not. But what I know for sure is that the tools to make realistic videos are surprisingly good, requiring surprisingly little effort and know-how. And that trend is c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌令人惊艳的新型通用AI模型
zh.summary: 谷歌的Gemini AI模型可以轻松从多样化的输入生成逼真的视频，凸显了深度伪造技术的易用性日益提高。该工具展示了生成式AI内容已经变得多么逼真，只需极少的技能就能创建。这一趋势引发了关于如何区分无害AI创意和有问题内容之间的关键问题。

title: Peec, one of Berlin’s rising startups, more than doubled annualized revenue in months to $10M, sources say
summary: Berlin-based startup Peec, which helps brands track their visibility in AI-powered search results, more than doubled its annualized revenue to $10 million in recent months. The rapid growth reflects strong market demand for tools monitoring brand presence in AI searches. This success illustrates emerging European startup innovation in AI-driven business solutions.
content: Peec, which helps brands track their presence in AI searches, offers proof of a key trend among European startups.

zh.title: 柏林初创企业Peec数月内年化收入翻倍超1000万美元，消息人士称
zh.summary: 柏林初创企业Peec帮助品牌追踪其在AI驱动搜索结果中的可见性，其年化收入在最近数月翻倍至1000万美元。这一快速增长反映了市场对AI搜索中品牌监测工具的强劲需求。该成功彰显了欧洲在AI驱动业务解决方案领域的新兴创新。
